name: Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast bread slices.
2. Spread peanut butter onto one side of each toast slice.
3. Place broken nut meats on top of the peanut butter.
4. Add chopped California dried figs.
5. Sprinkle a small amount of brown sugar over the figs.
6. Cut another slice of toasted bread and spread butter or margarine on it.
7. Place the cut slice on top of the figs, cheese-side down.
8. Broil until the cheese begins to melt.
9. Serve with apple and walnut salad, a sweet pickle or two, a hot soup, and your favorite beverage.
Note: This recipe is ideal for lunch-at-home for busy homemakers.
